landing.pageTitle: Core Solution — Counseling Center Management Solution
landing.pageDescription: Core Solution provides all-in-one scheduling, records, and billing for counseling centers. Start your free trial today.
landing.heroTitle: The Most Reliable Space for Mental Wellness
landing.heroSubtitle: From consultation records to appointment management, the perfect solution for center directors

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: Automatic reminders and calendar sync to prevent no-shows

settlement.title: Automated Billing
settlement.description: One-click settlement for complex manual calculations

landing.testimonial1Content: Administrative work was cut in half after adopting Core Solution.
landing.testimonial2Content: Scheduling and billing are automated so I can focus on counseling.
landing.testimonial3Content: The client management system is truly intuitive and secure.
landing.ctaTitle: Experience the difference in counseling center management.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Try all features free for 14 days.

onboarding.pageSubtitle: Set up your consultation center in just a few minutes.
